name: lemniscus
description: Local Apple Health MCP server. Query your heart rate, steps, sleep, workouts, and more — all data stays on your machine.

data_directory.title: Health Data Folder
data_directory.description: Folder containing your Apple Health export.xml file

tools.name: list_metrics
tools.description: List all available health metrics with counts, date ranges, and descriptive stats

tools.name: get_daily
tools.description: Daily aggregated values per metric (sum for steps/energy, avg for vitals, nightly sleep grouping). Supports top-N extremes.

tools.name: get_daily_joined
tools.description: Multi-metric daily pivot table — one row per date with all requested metrics as columns. For cross-metric analysis.

tools.name: get_summary
tools.description: Aggregated health statistics grouped by month or year

tools.name: query_readings
tools.description: Get individual raw readings filtered by metric and date range (up to 5000)

tools.name: reindex
tools.description: Re-scan data folder and index new Apple Health exports
